Meta.title: [One]Log — The AI transforming everyday life in Africa
Meta.description: One platform for your finances, your health, your growth and your mobility. [One]Log: Africa's versatile AI infrastructure — finance & trading, health, agriculture, transport and transactions.

Hero.titleB: that transforms your everyday life in
Hero.subtitle: One platform for your finances, your health, your growth and your mobility. [One]Log: the future of Africa, today.

Hub.title: One AI, all your sectors
Hub.subtitle: Our AI continuously processes data from five essential sectors to generate concrete, real-time solutions.

Dashboard.title: Your everyday life, augmented by AI
Dashboard.subtitle: A single dashboard to run what matters — finances, health, harvests, logistics and payments.

finance.name: Finance & Trading
finance.title: Your Markets at a Glance
finance.content: Optimize your investments with AI. Access financial markets and manage your IB partners with unmatched precision. Predictive analytics at your fingertips.

health.name: Health
health.title: Your Well-being, Our Priority
health.content: From managing your prescriptions to finding pharmacies, [One]Log's AI looks after your health. Smart solutions for a healthier life.

agriculture.name: Agriculture
agriculture.title: Optimize Your Harvests
agriculture.content: Revolutionize your farming with AI. Accurate weather forecasts, disease detection, yield optimization. Cultivate the future.

transport.name: Transport & Logistics
transport.title: Your Logistics, Simplified
transport.content: From fleet management to route optimization, our AI streamlines your operations. Efficiency and speed for every journey.

payments.name: Financial Transactions
payments.title: Instant, Secure Transfers
payments.content: Send and receive money with confidence. Fast, secure and transparent digital transactions, everywhere in Africa.

Solutions.featuresTitle: What the AI does for you
Solutions.ctaTitle: Ready to transform your everyday life?
Solutions.ctaSubtitle: Let's talk about your needs and how [One]Log can accelerate real impact.

finance.tagline: Invest with the intelligence of AI.
finance.intro: Access markets, manage your IB partners and anticipate trends with real-time predictive analytics. Institutional precision, within everyone's reach.

features.title: Predictive analytics
features.description: AI-generated market signals to act at the right moment.

features.title: Simplified IB management
features.description: Track partners, volumes and commissions from a single dashboard.

features.title: Real-time alerts
features.description: Get notified of opportunities and risks on your assets: gold, currencies, indices.

health.tagline: Your health, watched over by AI.
health.intro: From your prescriptions to treatment tracking and the nearest pharmacy, [One]Log orchestrates your daily care journey.

features.title: Treatment tracking
features.description: Smart reminders for medication and prescription renewals.

features.title: Appointments & specialists
features.description: Find the right practitioner and book consultations without friction.

features.title: Nearby pharmacies
features.description: Locate partner pharmacies and medication availability instantly.

agriculture.intro: Accurate weather forecasts, early disease detection and yield optimization: turn every plot into an informed decision.

features.title: Local weather forecasts
features.description: Anticipate rain and drought, and plan your farm work.

features.title: Crop health
features.description: Detect disease early and receive irrigation recommendations.

features.title: Market prices
features.description: Track crop prices to sell at the best time.

transport.intro: From fleet management to route optimization, our AI cuts your delays and costs on every trip.

features.title: Real-time tracking
features.description: Locate your shipments and predict arrival times accurately.

features.title: Route optimization
features.description: Routes continuously recalculated for traffic and priorities.

features.title: Fleet management
features.description: Predictive maintenance and vehicle availability at a glance.

payments.tagline: Send and receive, with full confidence.
payments.intro: Fast, secure and transparent digital transfers, built to flow everywhere in Africa.

features.title: Instant transfers
features.description: Send and receive money in seconds.

features.title: Encrypted security
features.description: Every transaction is protected end to end.

features.title: Full transparency
features.description: Clear fees and a clean history of your operations.

Stories.title: Real Problems, Real Solutions
Stories.subtitle: Every day, [One]Log harnesses the power of AI to solve Africa's most pressing challenges. See how we transform lives, one sector at a time.

agri.title: The AI that saved Mr. Diallo's harvest
agri.quote: [One]Log's forecasts and alerts let me anticipate disease and irrigate at the right time. My harvest grew by 30%.
agri.author: Mr. Diallo

health.title: Easier access to medicine for Mrs. Traoré
health.quote: [One]Log connected me to the right pharmacy and reminded me of my treatments. I manage my health stress-free.
health.author: Mrs. Traoré

finance.title: Stronger security for traders
finance.quote: Thanks to AI analytics, I trade with method and calm. [One]Log's security changed the way I invest.
finance.author: IB Trader

Vision.title: Building Africa's Future, Together
Vision.body: At [One]Log, we are driven by a "Stay Hungry" culture: an insatiable thirst for innovation and a deep commitment to the continent. Our vision is clear: to become the one versatile African infrastructure, unifying essential services for a prosperous, united future.
Vision.mapHint: Presence and rollout across the continent

hungry.title: Hungry for impact
hungry.description: Every solution must improve a real life.

together.title: Stronger together
together.description: Solidarity and local talent at the core of the project.

Contact.title: Ready to transform daily life with AI?
Contact.subtitle: Let's talk about your sector, your market, and how [One]Log can accelerate real impact.

sections.heading: Publisher
sections.body: This website is published by [One]Log. For any question, write to us at contact@onelog.io.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: All content — text, visuals, logo and code — is the property of [One]Log unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction without prior authorization is prohibited.

sections.heading: Legal details
sections.body: [To be completed — company name, legal form, registered address and registration number.]

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: This showcase site collects no data without your knowledge. The only information processed is what you voluntarily send us by email.

sections.heading: Cookies & trackers
sections.body: The site uses neither advertising cookies nor third-party profiling trackers.

sections.heading: Use of data
sections.body: Your information is used solely to respond to your request. It is never sold or shared with third parties.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: In accordance with applicable regulations (including the GDPR), you have the right to access, rectify and erase your data. Exercise them by writing to contact@onelog.io.

sections.heading: Data hosting
sections.body: The technical data required to display the site is processed by our host, Vercel.

sections.heading: Purpose
sections.body: These terms govern the use of the [One]Log website, which is informational and presents our solutions.

sections.heading: Access
sections.body: The site is freely accessible. [One]Log strives to keep it available but cannot be held liable for any interruption.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body: The [One]Log brand, its logo and its content are protected. Any unauthorized use engages the user's liability.

sections.heading: Liability
sections.body: Information is provided for guidance only and may change. It does not constitute a contractual commitment.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the law applicable at the publisher's registered office. [Competent jurisdiction to be specified.]

Faq.title: Everything you need to know
Faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about [One]Log.

items.a: A pan-African AI infrastructure that brings five essential sectors — finance & trading, health, agriculture, transport and transactions — into a single platform.
Our ambition is pan-African. Rollout is gradual: contact us to find out availability in your country.
It continuously analyzes your sector data to generate decisions, alerts and optimizations in real time.
Security and privacy are at the heart of [One]Log. Transactions are encrypted and your data is never sold.
Both. Farmer, patient, trader, merchant or company: [One]Log adapts its solutions to your everyday life.
Write to us via the contact form or at contact@onelog.io. We'll get back to you quickly.

About.title: Building Africa's future, together
About.intro: [One]Log was born from one conviction: artificial intelligence can tangibly transform the daily lives of millions of Africans by bringing essential services into a single platform.
About.missionBody: To democratize access to world-class AI tools — for finance, health, agriculture, transport and payments — and put them to work for real, measurable impact on the ground.
About.visionBody: To become the continent's leading versatile infrastructure: one AI, all your sectors, for a prosperous and united future.

values.title: Hungry for impact
values.description: Every solution must improve a real life.

values.title: Stronger together
values.description: Solidarity and local talent at the core of the project.

Careers.title: Build Africa's AI with us
Careers.intro: We're looking for minds hungry for impact, ready to solve real problems at scale. If the "Stay Hungry" culture speaks to you, let's talk.
Careers.openBody: No openings posted at the moment. We welcome spontaneous applications all year round.
Careers.spontaneousBody: Send us your profile and tell us what you'd love to build. The best opportunities often start with initiative.

Blog.title: The [One]Log Blog
Blog.subtitle: AI insights, stories and innovation for Africa. Coming soon.
Blog.soonBody: We're preparing articles on AI applied to finance, health, agriculture, logistics and payments. Check back soon.
